title: thymus villosus subsp. velascoi
intro: Thymus villosus subsp. velascoi is a subspecies of the thyme plant, a low-growing, perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as digestive problems and skin irritations. The health benefits of Thymus villosus subsp. velascoi include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Thymus villosus subsp. velascoi can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used topically or inhaled for their medicinal benefits.
